blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add endpoint validation for return location
Verify that the system allows specifying a different return location for one-way rentals.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a different return location for one-way rentals, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for a different return location, yet there is no evidence that explicitly verifies that the system supports this functionality or that it is correctly implemented in the bookings. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of different return locations for one-way rentals.
